tools.name: sequencerAddSection
tools.description: Add a section (time range) to a track in a level sequence. The section defines the frame range over which keyframes can be placed.

parameters.name: actorName
parameters.description: Name of the bound actor (alternative to bindingGuid)

parameters.name: bindingGuid
parameters.description: GUID of the binding (alternative to actorName)

parameters.name: trackType
parameters.description: Track type: Transform, Float, Bool, Visibility, SkeletalAnimation

parameters.name: startFrame
parameters.description: Start frame number for the section

parameters.name: endFrame
parameters.description: End frame number for the section

tools.name: sequencerSetKeyframe
tools.description: Set a keyframe value at a specific frame in a sequencer track. For Transform tracks use lx/ly/lz (location), rx/ry/rz (rotation), sx/sy/sz (scale) or location/rotation/scale objects. For Float tracks use 'value'. For Bool/Visibility tracks use 'value' (true/false).

parameters.name: actorName
parameters.description: Name of the bound actor (alternative to bindingGuid)

parameters.name: bindingGuid
parameters.description: GUID of the binding (alternative to actorName)

parameters.name: trackType
parameters.description: Track type: Transform, Float, Bool, Visibility

parameters.name: frame
parameters.description: Frame number to set the keyframe at

parameters.name: sectionIndex
parameters.description: Index of the section within the track (default 0)

parameters.name: interpolation
parameters.description: Interpolation mode: cubic, linear, constant (default cubic)

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value for Float (number) or Bool (true/false) tracks

tools.name: sequencerDeleteSection
tools.description: Remove a section from a track in a level sequence by index

parameters.name: actorName
parameters.description: Name of the bound actor (alternative to bindingGuid)

parameters.name: bindingGuid
parameters.description: GUID of the binding (alternative to actorName)

parameters.name: trackType
parameters.description: Track type: Transform, Float, Bool, Visibility

parameters.name: sectionIndex
parameters.description: Index of the section to remove

tools.name: materialAddNode
tools.description: Add a material expression node to a material graph. Supports TextureSample, Multiply, Add, Lerp, Constant, VectorParameter, ScalarParameter, and custom expression class paths.

parameters.name: nodeType
parameters.description: Expression type: TextureSample, Multiply, Add, Lerp, Constant, VectorParameter, ScalarParameter, or class path

tools.name: materialDeleteNode
tools.description: Delete a material expression node from a material graph by index.

parameters.name: nodeIndex
parameters.description: Index of the expression to delete (0-based)

tools.name: materialConnectPins
tools.description: Connect two material expression pins (output of one node to input of another or to a material property).

parameters.name: sourceNodeIndex
parameters.description: Index of the source expression node

parameters.name: sourceOutputIndex
parameters.description: Output pin index on source node (default 0)

parameters.name: targetNodeIndex
parameters.description: Index of the target expression node (-1 for material output)

parameters.name: targetInputIndex
parameters.description: Input pin index on target node (default 0)

parameters.name: materialProperty
parameters.description: Material property name if targeting material output (BaseColor, Metallic, Roughness, Normal, EmissiveColor, Opacity, etc.)

tools.name: materialDisconnectPin
tools.description: Disconnect a material expression input pin.

parameters.name: nodeIndex
parameters.description: Index of the expression node (-1 for material output)

parameters.name: materialProperty
parameters.description: Material property name if disconnecting from material output

tools.name: materialSetTextureParam
tools.description: Set the texture on a TextureSample or TextureParameter expression node.

parameters.name: nodeIndex
parameters.description: Index of the texture expression node

parameters.name: texturePath
parameters.description: Full asset path to the texture

tools.name: materialCreateInstance

parameters.name: instanceName
parameters.description: Name for the new material instance

parameters.name: savePath
parameters.description: Package path to save (default: same folder as parent)

parameters.name: scalarParams
parameters.description: Key-value pairs of scalar parameter overrides

parameters.name: vectorParams
parameters.description: Key-value pairs of vector parameter overrides (RGBA arrays)

parameters.description: Name of the material or material instance to assign

parameters.name: componentName

parameters.name: parentWidgetName
parameters.description: Name of the parent panel widget (default: root)

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value to set (string, number, or JSON depending on property)
